title: Calibration traceability and competence
description: Measurement equipment calibration is traceable to national or international standards where applicable.
equipment_types: Analytical Balance;Microbalance;Force/Torque Tester;Handheld Dimensional Tool;CMM;Optical Measurement System;Environmental Probe;Surface Profilometer;Universal Testing Machine;Hardness Tester
verification_expectation: Verify that calibration traceability and competence are documented.
acceptance_criteria: Calibration evidence demonstrates traceability per requirements.
rationale: ISO 17025 addresses calibration competence and traceability.

title: Measurement uncertainty considered
description: Where applicable measurement uncertainty is considered for equipment used in qualification or release decisions.
equipment_types: Analytical Balance;Microbalance;CMM;Optical Measurement System;Universal Testing Machine
verification_expectation: Verify that measurement uncertainty is addressed where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: Uncertainty is documented or justified where applicable.
rationale: ISO 17025 requires consideration of measurement uncertainty.
